code.code:
# Parse the map to find stairs position
lines = obs.split('\n')
# The map starts after "--- MAP ---" line
map_start = 0
for i, ln in enumerate(lines):
    if '--- MAP ---' in ln:
        map_start = i + 1
        break
map_lines = lines[map_start:map_start+21]  # typical map height
# Find player position on map
for i, ln in enumerate(map_lines):
    if '@' in ln:
        player_y = i
        player_x = ln.find('@')
        print(f"Player appears at y={player_y}, x={player_x} on map display")
        print(f"Line: '{ln}'")
# Find stairs
for i, ln in enumerate(map_lines):
    if '>' in ln:
        stairs_y = i
        stairs_x = ln.find('>')
        print(f"Stairs at y={stairs_y}, x={stairs_x} on map display")
        print(f"Line: '{ln}'")
# Relative position (positive dx = east, positive dy = south)
dx = stairs_x - player_x
dy = stairs_y - player_y

if dx > 0:

elif dx < 0:
    print(f"Move WEST {-dx} times")
if dy > 0:
    print(f"Move SOUTH {dy} times")
elif dy < 0:
    print(f"Move NORTH {-dy} times")
